articles.title: She is running Boston in honor of her mother who died of brain cancer
articles.description:
"It is because of the MGB cancer center that she did not die when I was ten — something I will be forever thankful for."

The post She is running Boston in honor of her mother who died of brain cancer appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Madison Oakes is running the Boston Marathon to honor her mother who died of brain cancer.
Oakes credits the MGB cancer center for extending her mother's life until she was ten.
The marathon serves as a tribute, raising awareness for cancer treatment in Boston.
